$description: Structure for self-correction records. Each correction documents what was wrong, how it was detected, and what changed. Written to corrections/correction-NNN.json.
detection_layer: 1 = artifact existence | 2 = temporal consistency | 3 = analytical coherence
issue_type: hallucinated_artifact | wrong_pid | wrong_offset | temporal_impossibility | timezone_confusion | mac_inconsistency | kill_chain_gap | cross_technique_contradiction | wrong_mitre_mapping | confidence_miscalibration | missing_alternative_hypothesis | wrong_registry_path | hash_mismatch | log_entry_mismatch
description: Human-readable description of what was wrong and why it matters
original_value: What the agent originally claimed (the incorrect assertion)
corrected_value: What the corrected assertion is (or 'REMOVED' if the finding was deleted)
verification_method: How the correction was verified — which MCP tool was re-invoked with what arguments
verification_output_hash: SHA256 hash of the verification tool output

impact.narrative_change: Brief description of how the attack narrative changed
